Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.functional

Interface FlixelPositional

All Superinterfaces:
FlixelAngleable
All Known Implementing Classes:
FlixelAnimateSprite, FlixelBar, FlixelObject, FlixelSprite, FlixelSpriteGroup, FlixelText
public interface FlixelPositional extends FlixelAngleable
Spatial and kinematic surface shared by FlixelObject: world position, size, scroll factors, velocity-based motion, and immovable toggling so motion tweens never need to cast to FlixelObject.
See Also:
  • FlixelObject

  • Method Details

    • getScrollX

      float getScrollX()
      Parallax scroll factor on X (1 means the object moves with the camera like a normal world object).
      Returns:
      Current scroll X factor.

    • getScrollY

      float getScrollY()
      Parallax scroll factor on Y (1 means the object moves with the camera like a normal world object).
      Returns:
      Current scroll Y factor.

    • setScrollFactor

      void setScrollFactor(float scrollX, float scrollY)
      Sets getScrollX() and getScrollY().
      Parameters:
      scrollX - Horizontal scroll factor.
      scrollY - Vertical scroll factor.

    • getX

      float getX()
      X position of the upper left corner of this object in world space.
      Returns:
      Current X in world units.

    • setX

      void setX(float x)
      Sets world X.
      Parameters:
      x - New X position.

      Y position of the upper left corner of this object in world space.
      Returns:
      Current Y in world units.

      Sets world Y.
      Parameters:
      y - New Y position.

      Width of this object's hitbox.

      Hitbox width.

      Sets hitbox width.

      width - New width.

      float getHeight()
      Height of this object's hitbox.

      Hitbox height.

      void setHeight(float height)
      Sets hitbox height.
      Parameters:
      height - New height.

    • getLastX

      float getLastX()
      X position at the start of the current frame, before motion.
      Returns:
      Last frame's starting X.

    • getLastY

      float getLastY()
      Y position at the start of the current frame, before motion.
      Returns:
      Last frame's starting Y.

    • setPosition

      default void setPosition(float x, float y)
      Helper that sets both world coordinates.
      Parameters:
      x - The new X position.
      y - The new Y position.

    • setSize

      void setSize(float width, float height)
      Shortcut for setting both getWidth() and getHeight().
      Parameters:
      width - The new width.
      height - The new height.

      float getDragX()
      Deceleration applied when getAccelerationX() is zero. Only applied when greater than 0.

      Horizontal drag.

      Sets horizontal drag.

      Rotational acceleration in degrees per second squared.

      float getAngularDrag()
      Rotational drag in degrees per second squared.

      void setAngularDrag(float ad)
      Sets rotational drag in degrees per second squared.

    • getMaxAngularVelocity

      float getMaxAngularVelocity()
      Maximum angular velocity in degrees per second.

    • setMaxAngularVelocity

      void setMaxAngularVelocity(float mav)
      Sets maximum angular velocity in degrees per second.

    • getMoves

      boolean getMoves()
      When true, FlixelObject.updateMotion(float) runs each frame on FlixelObject.
      Returns:
      Whether integrated motion is enabled.

    • setMoves

      void setMoves(boolean moves)
      Enables or disables automatic motion integration on FlixelObject.
      Parameters:
      moves - true to integrate velocity each frame.

    • isImmovable

      boolean isImmovable()
      When true, this object will not be moved by collision resolution. Other objects will still be pushed away from it.
      Returns:
      Current immovable flag.

    • setImmovable

      void setImmovable(boolean immovable)
      Sets whether collision resolution may move this object.
      Parameters:
      immovable - true to freeze this object during separation.
